tasks.subject: Task 1: Bump sudo TTL default to 15m
tasks.description:
**Goal:** auth.sudo_ttl defaults to 15m instead of 5m.

**Files:** pkg/configx/configx.go (~227 default, ~217/~125 comments), pkg/configx/configx_test.go (~64-65), CONFIG.md (~74)

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/configx/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/configx/configx.go", "pkg/configx/configx_test.go", "CONFIG.md"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/configx/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auth.sudo_ttl default is 15m", "configx_test asserts 15m", "CONFIG.md documents 15m"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Recent-auth window + multi-use gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fresh session elevated for SudoTTL (recent-auth window); step-up grant multi-use, not one-shot.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_sudo.go (consumeFreshSudo→read-only hasFreshSudo; requireFreshSudo), pkg/server/operations.go (registerSudoOp middleware), pkg/authn/middleware.go (SudoUntil comment), pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go (drop one-shot test; add window test), handle_me_password_test.go + handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp_test.go (one-shot→multi-use)

**Verify:** go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... ./pkg/authn/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go", "pkg/server/operations.go", "pkg/authn/middleware.go", "pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_password_test.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... ./pkg/authn/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gate satisfied by HasFreshSudo or recent IssuedAt", "gate is pure read", "multi-use within window", "stale session denied", "TTL=0 inert in tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Trim admin gates to posture/high-impact
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop fresh-sudo from reversible admin config; keep admin auth; keep step-up on credential/secret/privilege/destructive ops.

**Files:** pkg/server/server.go (swap helpers for DROP list ~415-482), pkg/server/admin_route_policy_test.go (remove dropped routes from sudoGatedRoutes)

**Verify:** go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestAdminMutationRoutesRequireSudo -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/server/admin_route_policy_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... -run TestAdminMutationRoutesRequireSudo -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DROP routes plain+admin", "KEEP routes sudo-gated", "policy test passes KEEP-only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Remove federation_oidc step-up (backend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the federation step-up surface without touching primary federation login.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_sudo.go, pkg/server/server.go, pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go, state.go, client.go, pkg/authn/errors.go, db/queries/account_identity.sql (+ sqlc generate → pkg/db/account_identity.sql.go, pkg/db/querier.go), handle_sudo_test.go, federation_test.go. KEEP authn.MethodFederationOIDC, validateFederationReturnTo, ListAccountIdentitiesByAccount, CountUsableSignInFederation.

**Verify:** go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... ./pkg/federation/... ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/db/... -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/state.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/client.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go", "db/queries/account_identity.sql", "pkg/db/account_identity.sql.go", "pkg/db/querier.go", "pkg/server/handle_sudo_test.go", "pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/server/... ./pkg/federation/... ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/db/... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no federation-sudo symbol refs remain", "methods returns {methods} only", "primary federation login passes", "build+vet clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Login-aligned local-only SudoModal + bounce
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restyle SudoModal.vue to mirror login's local section (passkey → OR → inline password+TOTP), remove federation UI, bounce upstream-only to /login.

**Files:** dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.vue (rewrite), dashboard/src/lib/sudo.ts (doc), dashboard/src/locales/en.ts (remove federation/toggle/noMethod keys + 2 error codes), dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.test.ts (remove federation/toggle/noMethod tests; add bounce + both-methods)

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.vue", "dashboard/src/lib/sudo.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/components/custom/SudoModal.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no federation UI", "passkey+OR+inline form when both", "bounce to /login when no local factor", "vitest+tsc pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Update smoke test for new step-up
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove federation-sudo smoke section; flip one-shot assertions to multi-use.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/main.go (delete fed-sudo 1-7; flip verifySudoGrantIsOneShot→multi-use; fix banner + audit counts)

**Verify:** throwaway Postgres (memory: live-smoke-without-podman), then go run ./cmd/smoke → smoke OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go run ./cmd/smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no federation sudo in smoke", "multi-use asserted", "banner+counts updated", "smoke OK"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Rebuild embedded SPA + full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regenerate committed pkg/webui/dist; run full CI gates.

**Files:** pkg/webui/dist/** (build artifact)

**Verify:** mise run ci:go && mise run ci:frontend (ci:frontend asserts committed dist matches fresh build)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/webui/dist"], "verifyCommand": "mise run ci:go && mise run ci:frontend", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist fresh-built", "ci:go passes", "ci:frontend passes incl dist-drift check"]}
```
